title: Vicloon Mini Umbrella, Pocket Umbrella with Golden Handle, 210T Black Rubber Cloth & 6 Aluminum Alloy Ribs, Foldable Compact Travel Umbrella, UPF>50+ UV Resistance
features: 🌂[Mini Ultra Light] - 18.5cm fold length, 90 * 60cm open size, 210g weight. Its size and weight similar to your cell phone, tiny enough to fit in your handbag, tote, backpack, luggage, car, briefcase and more, perfect for business, travel and your daily life.

☔[UV Protection] - Thicken vinyl, 210T Black Rubber Fabric. The high-tech nano polymer compound in the outermost coating layer to prevents 95% of the UV and other harmful sun rays, UPF>50+, mini travel umbrella can effectively prevent solar ultraviolet rays, prevent being tanned.

⛅[Wind & Waterproof] - Mini umbrella frame is made of aluminum alloy and the handle is in a gold flat shape. Withstand in the normal heavy wind and rain without flipping inside out. Waterproof coating make it dry quickly and you could just put it back into bag in short time after use.

🌞[Sturdy & Smooth Design] - Made of six-rib aluminum alloy come with a mental shaft. Closing and opening is manual while all work in a swift and easy motion. Easy to open and close without much strength needed. Magic sticker keeps it closed nicely.

💨[Fashion Gift] - Stylish look plus various bright colors for you to choose make this umbrella as a perfectly ideal gift to your family, friends and colleagues! Ideal for Halloween, Christmas and other holiday gifts.
description: Vicloon Mini Umbrella!🌂🌂🌂Ultra small, compact and lightweight, Fidus umbrella is super portable without take much room in anywhere.🌻🌻Easily and perfectly fit in your bag, purse, briefcase and glove box etc without weighing them down.🌻🌻Although light, it is sturdy enough to withstand in the high wind or the heavy rain.🌻🌻 ⛅Feature⛅👍 Mini Travel SizeWeigh only about 210g and only 18.5cm when closed, which is quite convenient to fit perfectly in purse, handbag, backpack and more around you anytime, anywhere. 👍 Perfect for Rain & SunMade of the canopy cloth with a layer of UV and water blocking coating,this UV compact umbrella is able to block 95% UV ray and protects you well from the strong sunlight and any expected downpours. 👍Sturdy,Durable & Wingproof Umbrella!Made of six-rib aluminum alloy come with a mental shaft. Closing and opening is manual, easy to open and close without much strength needed. Magic sticker keeps it closed nicely. 👍 Multiple Colors to ChooseAvailable in 5 colors to choose - Pink, Yellow, Black, White, Light Blue. Stylish look plus various bright colors for you to choose make this umbrella as a perfectly ideal gift to your family, friends and colleagues! Product Parameters🌞🌞🌞💦 Weight: 210g💦 Rib Quantity: 6 Ribs💦Close Length: 18.5cm💦 Open Size: 90 * 60 cm💦 Grip Shape: Flat (Gold)💦 Colour: Pink, Yellow, Black, White, Light Blue💦 Umbrella Stand Material: Aluminum Alloy💦Fabric Material: 210T Coating Water Repellent Fabric
